scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && lefthook install || echo 'Skipping lefthook (not a git repository)'
scripts.lint: oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json packages/types/src packages/validation/src packages/database-seed/src packages/design-system/src packages/ui/src packages/analytics/src packages/feature-flags/src packages/auth/src services/api/src apps/web/src apps/admin/src packages/oxlint-config packages/tsconfig packages/oxlint-config/package.json packages/tsconfig/package.json packages/types/package.json packages/validation/package.json packages/database-seed/package.json packages/design-system/package.json packages/ui/package.json packages/analytics/package.json packages/feature-flags/package.json packages/auth/package.json
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix --config .oxlintrc.json packages/types/src packages/validation/src packages/database-seed/src packages/design-system/src packages/ui/src packages/analytics/src packages/feature-flags/src packages/auth/src services/api/src apps/web/src apps/admin/src packages/oxlint-config packages/tsconfig
scripts.format: oxfmt packages/types/src packages/validation/src packages/database-seed/src packages/design-system/src packages/ui/src packages/analytics/src packages/feature-flags/src packages/auth/src services/api/src apps/web/src apps/admin/src packages/oxlint-config packages/tsconfig package.json turbo.json lefthook.yml .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check packages/types/src packages/validation/src packages/database-seed/src packages/design-system/src packages/ui/src packages/analytics/src packages/feature-flags/src packages/auth/src services/api/src apps/web/src apps/admin/src packages/oxlint-config packages/tsconfig package.json turbo.json lefthook.yml .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck
scripts.check:fix: bun run lint:fix && bun run format
